title: Add buildah bud options from common.go
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

I recently remembered that 'buildah bud' shared a number of options with 'buildah from'.  Those options were in cmd/buildah/common.go and not in cmd/buildah/bud.go where the list of options in this code originated from.  Plus @umohnani8 has been adding other features there recently too. 

This commit adds those "common" build options in 'buildah bud' to 'podman build' and touched up a few man page boo boos, we'd 'podman bud' in three places rather than 'podman build'

comments.body: LGTM. Would love it if there was a better way to do this than duplicating flags, but I don't think we're that lucky.
Rats gofmt, thanks for the heads up @mheon.

:pushpin: Commit 6061dd9 has been approved by `rhatdan`
